title: Electronic mailing list - Enhanced financial account information reporting - Canada.ca
content:
## Electronic mailing list - Enhanced financial account information reporting
When you subscribe to this electronic mailing list, we’ll send you an email when new information is added to our website, including:
- updates on the due diligence and reporting obligations for Canadian financial institutions;
- updates to technical specifications and instructions to complete and file Part XVIII and XIX information returns; and
- information for account holders with accounts with Canadian financial institutions.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
